faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about tutoring journey in Space2Study as a tutor
faq.findStudentDescription: Finding the best student can ensure a smooth tutoring experience. Start by posting detailed offers specifying your expertise, subjects, and availability. You can also review student requests and respond to suitable ones.
faq.tutorProfile: How to fill out a tutor’s profile
faq.tutorProfileDescription: Ensure your profile is complete with accurate details about your qualifications, experience, and teaching style. A well-filled profile increases your chances of attracting students.
faq.rulesDescription: Tutors must ensure they provide accurate information and conduct lessons professionally. They must not distribute student-provided materials or engage in unethical behavior.
faq.howPayLessons: How you can be paid for lessons
faq.howPayLessonsDescription: Tutors receive payments directly from students based on agreed-upon terms. The Space2Study platform does not impose commissions on approved collaborations.
